name: insta-health-dashboard
description: 米粉インスタ運営 進捗管理ダッシュボード：Google Sheets + Gemini AI + Surge

scripts.run-all: npm run fetch-data && npm run calculate-health && npm run ai-suggestions && npm run generate-dashboard && npm run take-screenshot && npm run deploy && npm run save-daily-log && npm run send-line
scripts.run-all-pages: npm run fetch-data && npm run calculate-health && npm run ai-suggestions && npm run generate-dashboard && npm run take-screenshot && npm run deploy-pages && npm run save-daily-log && npm run send-line
